data.content:
This is an MSTest 3.x project on VSTest. Combine the two conditions with `&` in a `--filter` expression:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

This uses:
- `ClassName~OrderServiceTests` — matches the class name (substring match via `~`)
- `TestCategory=Unit` — matches the `[TestCategory("Unit")]` attribute
- `&` — logical AND, so both conditions must be true

That will run only `CreateOrder_ValidInput_ReturnsOrder` and `CreateOrder_NullInput_ThrowsException`.
data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the "Unit" category tests within the `OrderServiceTests` class. This is an MSTest v3 project running on VSTest. They need to combine two filter conditions: class name and test category.
